sentences.target: Mein Babysitter kommt heute um sechs.

translations.de: Mein Babysitter kommt heute um sechs.
translations.en: My babysitter is coming at six today.
translations.es: Mi niñera viene hoy a las seis.
translations.fr: La baby-sitter arrive aujourd’hui à six heures.
translations.it: La babysitter arriva oggi alle sei.
translations.pt: Minha babá chega hoje às seis.
translations.vi: Hôm nay người trông trẻ đến lúc sáu giờ.
translations.ar: ستأتي المربية اليوم عند الساعة السادسة.
translations.nl: De oppas komt vandaag om zes uur.
translations.el: Η μπέιμπι σίτερ θα έρθει σήμερα στις έξι.
translations.nb: Barnevakten kommer klokka seks i dag.
translations.id: Pengasuh anak datang hari ini jam enam.
translations.sv: Barnvakten kommer klockan sex i dag.
translations.ro: Bona vine azi la ora șase.
translations.da: Babysitteren kommer i dag klokken seks.
translations.ja: 今日はベビーシッターが6時に来ます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying the noun Babysitter; nominative, agrees with the subject.
Common noun; masculine nominative singular serving as the subject of the clause.
Finite main verb in present tense; 3rd person singular agreeing with Babysitter.
Temporal adverb indicating the day; modifies the verb kommt.
Preposition used with times; governs accusative in the temporal phrase.
Cardinal numeral functioning as the complement to the preposition um (time point, accusative).

sentences.target: Ich suche einen Babysitter für morgen Abend.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈzuːxə ˈaɪnən ˈbeːbiˌzɪtɐ fyːɐ ˈmɔʁɡən ˈaːbənt/

translations.de: Ich suche einen Babysitter für morgen Abend.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈzuːxə ˈaɪnən ˈbeːbiˌzɪtɐ fyːɐ ˈmɔʁɡən ˈaːbənt/
translations.en: I’m looking for a babysitter for tomorrow evening.
translations.es: Busco niñera para mañana por la noche.
translations.fr: Je cherche une baby-sitter pour demain soir.
translations.it: Cerco una babysitter per domani sera.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在找明天晚上的保姆。
translations.pt: Procuro babá para amanhã à noite.
translations.vi: Tôi đang tìm người trông trẻ cho tối mai.
translations.ar: أبحث عن جليسة أطفال لمساء الغد.
translations.nl: Ik zoek een oppas voor morgenavond.
translations.hi: मैं कल शाम के लिए बेबीसिटर ढूँढ रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Ψάχνω μπέιμπι σίτερ για αύριο το βράδυ.
translations.nb: Jeg leter etter barnevakt til i morgen kveld.
translations.id: Saya mencari pengasuh anak untuk besok malam.
translations.sv: Jag letar efter barnvakt till imorgon kväll.
translations.ro: Caut o bonă pentru mâine seară.
translations.da: Jeg leder efter en babysitter til i morgen aften.
translations.ja: 明日の夜に来てくれるベビーシッターを探しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; nominative singular serving as the subject.
Finite main verb; present tense, 1st person singular agreeing with Ich.
Indefinite article; masculine accusative singular marking the direct object Babysitter.
Common noun; masculine accusative singular as the direct object of suche.
Preposition meaning ‘for’; governs accusative, introducing a temporal/prepositional phrase.
Temporal adverb modifying Abend within the PP; forms a fixed time expression ‘morgen Abend’.
Common noun; accusative singular as complement of für in the temporal PP ‘für morgen Abend’.

sentences.target: Der Babysitter liest den Kindern eine Geschichte.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ ˈbeːbiˌzɪtɐ liːst deːn ˈkɪndɐn ˈaɪnə ɡəˈʃɪçtə/

translations.de: Der Babysitter liest den Kindern eine Geschichte.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ ˈbeːbiˌzɪtɐ liːst deːn ˈkɪndɐn ˈaɪnə ɡəˈʃɪçtə/
translations.en: The babysitter is reading the children a story.
translations.es: La niñera está leyendo un cuento a los niños.
translations.fr: La baby-sitter lit une histoire aux enfants.
translations.it: La babysitter sta leggendo una storia ai bambini.
translations.ko: 베이비시터가 아이들에게 이야기를 읽어 주고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 保姆正在给孩子们讲故事。
translations.yue: 保姆喺度同小朋友講故事。
translations.pt: A babá está lendo uma história para as crianças.
translations.vi: Người trông trẻ đang đọc truyện cho bọn trẻ.
translations.nl: De oppas leest de kinderen een verhaaltje voor.
translations.hu: A bébiszitter mesét olvas a gyerekeknek.
translations.hi: बेबीसिटर बच्चों को कहानी पढ़ रही है.
translations.el: Η μπέιμπι σίτερ διαβάζει στα παιδιά ένα παραμύθι.
translations.nb: Barnevakten leser en historie for barna.
translations.id: Pengasuh anak sedang membacakan cerita untuk anak-anak.
translations.sv: Barnvakten läser en saga för barnen.
translations.ro: Bona le citește copiilor o poveste.
translations.da: Babysitteren læser en historie for børnene.
translations.ja: ベビーシッターが子どもたちに絵本を読んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; masculine nominative singular marking the subject noun Babysitter.
Common noun; masculine nominative singular serving as the subject.
Finite main verb; present tense, 3rd person singular agreeing with Babysitter.
Definite article; dative plural here, marking the indirect object Kindern (recipient).
Common noun; dative plural as the recipient/indirect object of liest.
Indefinite article; feminine accusative singular marking the direct object Geschichte.
Common noun; feminine accusative singular as the direct object (thing being read).

sentences.target: Wir bezahlen den Babysitter nach dem Film.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ bəˈtsaːlən deːn ˈbeːbiˌzɪtɐ naːx deːm fɪlm/

translations.de: Wir bezahlen den Babysitter nach dem Film.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ bəˈtsaːlən deːn ˈbeːbiˌzɪtɐ naːx deːm fɪlm/
translations.en: We pay the babysitter after the movie.
translations.es: Le pagamos a la niñera después de la película.
translations.fr: On paie la baby-sitter après le film.
translations.it: Paghiamo la babysitter dopo il film.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在电影结束后给保姆付钱。
translations.yue: 睇完戲我哋畀錢俾保姆。
translations.pt: Pagamos a babá depois do filme.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi trả tiền cho người trông trẻ sau khi xem phim.
translations.nl: We betalen de oppas na de film.
translations.hu: A film után fizetünk a bébiszitternek.
translations.hi: हम फिल्म के बाद बेबीसिटर को पैसे देते हैं.
translations.el: Πληρώνουμε τη μπέιμπι σίτερ μετά την ταινία.
translations.id: Kami membayar pengasuh anak setelah menonton film.
translations.ja: 映画のあとでベビーシッターにお金を払います。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; nominative plural serving as the subject.
Finite main verb; present tense, 1st person plural agreeing with Wir.
Definite article; masculine accusative singular marking the direct object Babysitter.
Common noun; masculine accusative singular as the direct object of bezahlen.
Preposition meaning ‘after’; governs dative, introducing a temporal PP.
Definite article; masculine dative singular marking the object of nach.
Common noun; masculine dative singular as the complement of the preposition nach; temporal frame.
